title: get_vapid_public_key called redundantly in every handler
description: File: src/api.rs and src/push.rs. get_vapid_public_key(pool) is called in create_app, verify_app_credentials, instance_v1, instance_v2, and inside push subscription create/get. Each call hits the DB. Since the VAPID key is immutable once created, it should be loaded once at startup and stored in AppState.
